office_does: The auditor administers elections, recording, licensing, and county financial processes.
race_blurb: Appointed auditor Shannon Falstad faces business owner Andrew Koeppen and Darci Homesley.

candidates.summary: Koeppen is a business owner running on accountability, personal responsibility, and private-sector management.
highlights: Owns a local printing and marketing business [S1][S2]

experience.basis: He presents private-sector management as an outsider alternative to auditor-office experience.

candidates.summary: Homesley is a candidate for auditor; the approved dossiers establish no detailed platform or prior auditor record.
highlights: Official election records verify her candidacy [S1][S2]

candidates.summary: Falstad is the appointed auditor and a roughly 30-year county employee focused on continuity, accounting implementation, retention, and stability.
highlights: Has about 20 years in the auditor's office and roughly 30 years with the county [S1][S2]
Prioritizes election continuity, staff retention, and accounting-system implementation [S2]

experience.basis: Appointed incumbency plus decades of detailed auditor and county operational experience provide a maximal proven record.
